### Post by Script Warlock on 2009-10-22
hello mga gurus, sino marunong gumamit ng reswrap meron sana akong convert na gif icon may hint ba tayo dyan...

eto yung output: 
lerio@lerio-desktop:~$ reswrap -x -n -o[a] image.gif
/* Generated by reswrap version 4.0.0 */

namespace -o[a] {

reswrap: unable to open input file image.gif

---

### Post by loell on 2009-10-22
yung **-o[a]**  ay  **-oa** lang

at yung "image.gif" na file ay nasa current directory.

---

halimbawa sa home?..wala ba tong reverse kumbaga from hex to image uli...
